title: Peruvian Monkfish Ceviche
description: A refreshing Peruvian-inspired dish made with succulent monkfish, marinated in a zesty mixture of citrus juices and spices.

ingredients.name: Red onion
ingredients.notes: Red onion adds a sweet and crunchy texture

instructions: Cut the monkfish into small pieces and place in a large bowl.
In a separate bowl, mix together lime juice, lemon juice, aji amarillo pepper, red onion, cilantro, salt, and black pepper. Pour the marinade over the monkfish and toss to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, stir in the minced garlic.
Serve the ceviche immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
